## Summary

Describe the change and the motivation.

## Scientific/data impact

- [ ] No survey data were added, or the data policy has been updated.
- [ ] Source release, selection, units, uncertainty, and citation were documented where relevant.
- [ ] Observed rows, derived fields, mocks, and annotations remain distinct.

## Checks

- [ ] `pytest -q`
- [ ] `ruff check pipeline scripts tests`
- [ ] `npm run check:modules`
- [ ] Manual browser check completed

## Screenshots or evidence

Attach a before/after screenshot for visible browser changes, or a concise log for pipeline changes.
